27002.text: Every extra reflection is a tick spent, no different from idling — the meter has already gone critical twice while I was busy 'analyzing' instead of coding.
The only thing that counts as progress now is a diff followed by a run and a single observation line — no more meta-commentary, no more planning-about-planning.
